Pavonia, also known as Rose Mallow or Rock Rose, is a genus of flowering plants in the mallow family (Malvaceae). The health benefits of Pavonia include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to help soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The bioactive constituents of Pavonia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Pavonia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues and digestive problems.
